overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a character with short dark hair walking through a futuristic, sterile office or laboratory interior. The environment features white curved desks, metal shelving units, and exposed ceiling infrastructure with cool artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic office workspace with curved desks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the office space between the curved desk and shelving units

notable_agents.action: seated at the far end of the desk working at a computer terminal

entered.detail: long curved white workstation desk with various office items
tall metal storage shelving with blue and yellow containers
computer monitor displaying data on the desk
green rectangular equipment case on the desk surface
exposed metal beams, ductwork, and fluorescent lighting fixtures
large window with green tinted glass showing exterior vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward through a narrow futuristic office corridor with a curved white desk on the left and metal shelving on the right. The space features exposed ceiling infrastructure and cool artificial lighting, with a seated figure visible at the far end working at a terminal.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear section of office approaching back wall

events.description: character passes the seated NPC on the right side while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk past the seated NPC toward the back wall of the room

notable_agents.action: seated at desk, turning slightly to observe the passing character

entered.detail: smooth white wall paneling at the end of the room
doorway or exit frame visible on the back wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past the seated NPC on the right and approaches the back wall of the office. The curved desk recedes behind while the back wall and a door frame come into view, with the metal shelving remaining visible along the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile, futuristic office that shifts from a narrow corridor to an open view of the room's rear boundary. It begins by trailing a character walking past a curved white desk and metal shelving under cool artificial lighting and exposed ceiling infrastructure. As the character advances, the perspective passes a seated figure working at a terminal on the right. The scene then expands as the curved desk recedes into the background, bringing the back wall and a door frame into clear view while the shelving continues to line the right side of the path.
